scenes.narration: Every AI workflow starts with copy. But raw copy throws away the intent.
Enhanced Copy upgrades the clipboard payload. Source, task, content type, and the selected text move together.
Docs teams add one attribute. Explain, debug, summarize, ask, and share become native copy actions.
Developers get the same workflow on any website through the Chrome extension, without background clipboard capture.
Clipboard by default. Chrome AI, Ollama, webhooks, and bring your own model APIs when the user chooses.
Enhanced Copy. Copy should carry intent. Open source on GitHub.
